title: Armored Collars
description: Unobtrusive wolf armor still visible in the form of a larger collar!
body: Simply takes the existing vanilla collar texture and uses it as the wolf armor texture, an "armored collar" if you will. You're still able to tell armor is on a wolf due to the wolf armor being an overlay. I'd recommend having the same colored regular collar and armored collar, since the armored collar doesn't completely cover the regular collar.
